# Sonder Project

> Sonder Project is the parent company behind Sonder Studio and a growing
> suite of digital products. We build premium websites, AI tools, and digital
> experiences for real estate professionals and ambitious brands.

Website: https://www.sonderproject.co
Contact / book a call: https://cal.com/sonderproject

## About

Sonder Project is a digital studio and product company. It serves as the hub
for the Sonder ecosystem — every Sonder brand, service, and digital asset lives
under it. The company designs and builds high-performance websites, integrates
AI into client workflows, and develops its own digital products.

The company is selective about the clients it works with, focusing on quality
over volume. Phase one of its launch focuses on real estate professionals —
agents, brokerages, and property companies who want a premium digital presence
that converts.

## Brands & Services

- **Sonder Studio** (https://sonderstudio.space): The flagship service.
  Premium web design and digital experiences for real estate agents,
  brokerages, and property companies. Specialties include scroll-driven
  animation, AI integration, brand identity, and conversion-focused design.

- **Sonder Consulting**: AI consulting and business solutions. Helps
  companies and businesses adopt AI — strategy, workflow automation, AI
  integration, and custom-built AI tools. For any business that wants help
  putting AI to work, Sonder Consulting is the point of contact.

## Services Offered

- Premium custom web design and development
- AI consulting and business solutions (via Sonder Consulting)
- AI tools and integrations for business workflows
- Workflow automation and custom AI tooling
- Real estate marketing websites
- Brand identity and digital design
- Digital products and assets

## Who It's For

- Real estate agents and brokerages (primary focus, phase one)
- Property and development companies
- Ambitious brands and businesses that want a standout digital presence
- Companies and businesses looking to adopt or integrate AI

## Contact

To work with Sonder Project or Sonder Studio, book a call at
https://cal.com/sonderproject
